user_db_state.title: User Database State
user_db_state.description: The unified system state containing classroom members, sessions, and historic attendance registers

participants.description: List of participants in the database

sessions.description: Chronological history of program tracking sessions

attendance.description: Nested records of student attendance statuses mapped by participantId and date

lastUpdated.description: The server-synced timestamp of the latest change

/users/{userId}/data/metrics.description: Personal secure cloud space holding synchronized attendance metrics, participants database, and session dates
